acceptance_criteria: CodeClash is checked out at commit 381cdfa05a35e8acd35853b9fc7e13005121b127.
The no-LLM dummy tournament produces metadata and logs.
Metadata contains four round-stat entries for rounds 0 through 3.
All player submissions are valid in every parsed round.
Diff-scope records are present and empty, as expected for dummy agents.

evidence.notes: Raw GitHub Actions artifact bundle is committed, including metadata, logs, player change files, and round archives.
CodeClash dummy unit smoke passed and tournament metadata parsed four valid rounds.
Per-player change files exist for rounds 1 through 3 and contain empty diffs, expected for dummy agents.
Review limits the claim to infrastructure and receipt validity; no model or leaderboard result is claimed.
No production or live-domain behavior changed.

falsifiers: Receipt fails if the workflow did not complete successfully.
Receipt fails if CodeClash was not checked out at the frozen commit.
Receipt fails if metadata lacks parseable round statistics.
Receipt fails if any player submission is invalid in the parsed rounds.
Receipt fails if diff-scope evidence is absent.
Receipt fails if the result claims model capability or leaderboard performance.
stated_goal: Run the no-LLM CodeClash dummy tournament and verify that Telos can capture artifact, test, diff-scope, and review evidence from a public agent-workflow run.
